crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

blocks.text: Before performing the inspection, check relay box No. A14 (10A), fuse box No. B7 (7.5A), sub fuse/relay box No. C1 (15A) and fuses for blown or connected conditions.
1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

blocks.text: 2. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace fuse box. Each coupler is all female-terminated on the cord side.

rows.text: Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G202) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G403) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity between the inspection terminal and the data link coupler No. 10 terminal
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the combination meter coupler (32P) No. 31 terminal.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the combination meter coupler (32P) No. 30 terminal.
Disconnect the headlight auto-leveling control unit coupler (12-pin)
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the headlight auto-leveling control unit coupler (12P) No. 8 terminal.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the headlight auto-leveling control unit coupler (12P) No. 7 terminal.
Disconnect the auto light control unit coupler (7P)
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the No. 7 terminal of the auto light control unit coupler (7P).
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the auto light control unit coupler (7P) No. 6 terminal.
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the audio unit coupler D (24P) No. 11 terminal.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the audio unit coupler D (24P) No. 23 terminal.
Disconnect the auto A/C control unit coupler (32P)
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the auto A/C control unit coupler (32P) coupler No. 18 terminal.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and the auto A/C control unit coupler (32P) No. 17 terminal.
